parameters.name: chop
parameters.label: CHOP
parameters.description: Specifies which Network / contains the sample data to fetch.

parameters.name: rord
parameters.label: Rotate Order
parameters.description: Specifies the order in which the Rotate Channel X / Y / Z channels are applied.

parameters.name: chanx
parameters.label: X Channel
parameters.description: Channels used to specify the point's positions, tx.

parameters.name: chany
parameters.label: Y Channel
parameters.description: Channels used to specify the point's positions, ty.

parameters.name: chanz
parameters.label: Z Channel
parameters.description: Channels used to specify the point's positions, tz.

parameters.name: chanrx
parameters.label: Rotate Channel X
parameters.description: Channels used to specify the rotational data of the geomtery created at each point. Only used when Output Type is " at Each " or " Circle at Each ".

parameters.name: chanry
parameters.label: Rotate Channel Y
parameters.description: Channels used to specify the rotational data of the geomtery created at each point. Only used when Output Type is " at Each " or " Circle at Each ".

parameters.name: chanrz
parameters.label: Rotate Channel Z
parameters.description: Channels used to specify the rotational data of the geomtery created at each point. Only used when Output Type is " at Each " or " Circle at Each ".

parameters.name: chanrad
parameters.label: Radius Channel
parameters.description: Uniformly controls the radius of the geometry created at each point. The Radius channels are multiplied with the Radius parameter on the .

parameters.name: chanradx
parameters.label: Radius Channel X
parameters.description: Channels that control the radius on the respective axis. The Radius channels are multiplied with the Radius parameter on the .

parameters.name: chanrady
parameters.label: Radius Channel Y
parameters.description: Channels that control the radius on the respective axis. The Radius channels are multiplied with the Radius parameter on the .

parameters.name: chanradz
parameters.label: Radius Channel Z
parameters.description: Channels that control the radius on the respective axis. The Radius channels are multiplied with the Radius parameter on the .

parameters.name: chanalpha
parameters.label: Alpha Channel
parameters.description: Controls the point alpha, giving you alpha control of any geometry created at those points.

parameters.name: chanr
parameters.label: Red Channel
parameters.description: These channels control the point color, or the color of any geometry created at those points.

parameters.name: chang
parameters.label: Green Channel
parameters.description: These channels control the point color, or the color of any geometry created at those points.

parameters.name: chanb
parameters.label: Blue Channel
parameters.description: These channels control the point color, or the color of any geometry created at those points.

parameters.name: texturew
parameters.label: Texture W
parameters.description: Controls the w texture-offset for the point(s) This is most often used as a frame-offset or time-offset, expressed in # of frames from the current frame or frame 1 of an image sequence.

parameters.name: customattr
parameters.label: Custom Attribute
parameters.description: Sequence of custom attributes to be added to the geometry created.

parameters.name: customattr0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: Specify the name of the custom attribute, for example pscale, age, or any custom name.

parameters.name: customattr0chan0
parameters.label: Channel Zero
parameters.description: Select which channel to assign to the [0] index of the attribute. ie. pscale[0]

parameters.name: customattr0chan1
parameters.label: Channel One
parameters.description: Select which channel to assign to the [1] index of the attribute. ie. pscale[1]

parameters.name: customattr0chan2
parameters.label: Channel Two
parameters.description: Select which channel to assign to the [2] index of the attribute. ie. pscale[2]

parameters.name: customattr0chan3
parameters.label: Channel Three
parameters.description: Select which channel to assign to the [3] index of the attribute. ie. pscale[3]

parameters.name: output
parameters.label: Output Type
parameters.description: The type of geometry the Limit produces from its sample data.

parameters.name: divisions
parameters.label: Divisions
parameters.description: Only works on the following Output Types.

parameters.name: rad
parameters.label: Radius
parameters.description: Radius of geometry created. Disabled for "Polygonal Line".

parameters.name: flipsmooth
parameters.label: Smooth Flip
parameters.description: Dynamically controls the twist of each instance of geometry on a series of points to avoid frame-by-frame flipping, which can sometimes occur when geometry is oriented along a path.

parameters.name: dolimit
parameters.label: Limit
parameters.description: Creates a bounding box for the position of the output geometry. Drop down menu determines behavior when outside bounded region.

parameters.name: texture
parameters.label: Apply Texture
parameters.description: Applys u, v, and w texture coordinates to the created geometry.

parameters.name: orient
parameters.label: Orient to Path
parameters.description: If this option is selected, the object will be oriented along the path. To see what the path looks like, change the Output Type to "Polygonal Line". When the Output Type is " / Circle at Each ", the p

parameters.name: lookat
parameters.label: Lookat Object
parameters.description: Orient to must be checked for Lookat Object to have any effect. This allows you to orient your geometry by naming the object you would like it to Look At, or point to. Once you have designated this ob

parameters.name: dorotate
parameters.label: Rotate Polys
parameters.description: Rotate the geometry at each point using the Rotate parameter (below). Only works for Output Type is " / Circle at Each ".

parameters.name: normals
parameters.label: Compute Normals
parameters.description: Computes normals for the geometry created.

parameters.name: rotatez
parameters.label: Rotatez
parameters.description: Rotation channels rx, ry, and rz for Rotate Polys parameter.

parameters.name: texscale2
parameters.label: Texscale2
parameters.description: Scales the texture coordinates a specific amount.

parameters.name: xlimitmax
parameters.label: Xlimitmax
parameters.description: Parameters to set edges of bounding region when Limit is active.

parameters.name: zlimitmax
parameters.label: Zlimitmax
parameters.description: Parameters to set edges of bounding region when Limit is active.

parameters.name: ylimitmax
parameters.label: Ylimitmax
parameters.description: Parameters to set edges of bounding region when Limit is active.

parameters.name: texoffset2
parameters.label: Texoffset2
parameters.description: Offsets the texture coordinates a specific amount.

examples.label: Configure X Channel and Y Channel
examples.description: Common settings from 11 real Derivative examples
